appliedUpdates.description: Added `bench_smoke: bun run bench:smoke` to .factory/services.yaml so shared command inventory matches the release gate command surface.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether a composed gate command entry (`bun run check`) is sufficient evidence when it already includes deadcode/build/test/lint/typecheck, or if separate explicit command entries are still mandatory.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for m6-scrutiny-fixes notes ambiguity between SKILL.md command-evidence expectations and handoffs that use composed gate evidence only.
